zh.title: 数学建模训练
zh.claim: 能把开放问题拆成变量、假设、模型、数据处理和论文表达。
zh.boundary: 证据来自公开获奖证书；具体赛题论文不在公开站点发布。

en.title: Modeling Practice
en.claim: Able to turn open-ended problems into variables, assumptions, models, analysis, and written arguments.
en.boundary: Supported by public award certificates; full competition papers are not published on the public site.

zh.title: 学业表现与综合荣誉
zh.claim: GPA、排名、奖学金和校级荣誉共同支撑稳定的学习表现。
zh.boundary: 公开站点只展示脱敏结果和证书，不展示学号、出生年月或完整评审材料。

en.title: Academic Performance
en.claim: GPA, ranking, scholarship, and university merit recognition support sustained academic performance.
en.boundary: The public site shows sanitized outcomes and certificates, not student ID, birth date, or full review files.

zh.title: 化学学科基础
zh.claim: 高中阶段化学竞赛训练支撑后续有机化学、计算化学和 AI 化学方向兴趣。
zh.boundary: 证据限于公开证书；本科阶段研究项目仍以方向说明和学习路径为主。

en.title: Chemistry Foundation
en.claim: Chemistry competition training supports later interest in organic chemistry, computational chemistry, and AI chemistry.
en.boundary: Evidence is limited to public certificates; undergraduate research work remains framed as direction and training.

zh.title: AI-KM 科研学习工作流
zh.claim: 能用 AI 工具、Zotero、Obsidian、Markdown 与 LaTeX 管理文献阅读、学习复盘和科研表达。
zh.boundary: 当前是公开案例说明，不发布私人知识库、原始 PDF、账号信息或未脱敏笔记截图。

en.title: AI-KM Research Workflow
en.claim: Uses AI tools, Zotero, Obsidian, Markdown, and LaTeX to manage reading, reflection, and research communication.
en.boundary: This is a public case narrative; private vault content, raw PDFs, account data, and unsanitized note screenshots stay unpublished.

zh.title: 公开作品集系统
zh.claim: 能把简历、证据、项目说明、材料入口和自动化 QA 组织成可维护的双语静态站点。
zh.boundary: 站点本身是项目案例；生产源码和部署记录由仓库与 Actions 维护。

en.title: Public Portfolio System
en.claim: Organizes resumes, evidence, project narratives, material routing, and automated QA into a maintainable bilingual static site.
en.boundary: The site itself is the project case; source and deployment records are maintained through the repository and Actions.

zh.title: 校园协作与综合发展
zh.claim: 辩论、志愿服务和体育活动共同支撑表达、协作、组织与长期参与能力。
zh.boundary: 公开证据只用于说明综合发展，不替代正式学生工作证明或完整活动记录。

en.title: Campus Collaboration
en.claim: Debate, volunteer service, and sports activities support communication, collaboration, organization, and sustained participation.
en.boundary: Public evidence explains broader development, not a substitute for formal student-work records.
